# signoz_planned_maintenance (Resource)

Creates and manages planned maintenance windows in SigNoz. Alerts firing during a maintenance window are suppressed (or scoped to specific alert IDs).

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    signoz = {
      source = "registry.terraform.io/signoz/signoz"
    }
  }
}

provider "signoz" {
  endpoint     = "http://localhost:8080"
  access_token = "<SIGNOZ-API-KEY>"
}

# A weekly recurring maintenance window: 2 hours every Mon/Wed/Fri,
# starting 1 June 2026, in UTC.
resource "signoz_planned_maintenance" "weekly" {
  name        = "weekly-deploy-window"
  description = "Weekly recurring downtime window."

  schedule = {
    timezone   = "UTC"
    start_time = "2026-06-01T00:00:00Z"

    recurrence = {
      duration    = "2h"
      repeat_type = "weekly"
      start_time  = "2026-06-01T00:00:00Z"
      repeat_on   = ["monday", "wednesday", "friday"]
    }
  }
}

output "planned_maintenance_id" {
  value = signoz_planned_maintenance.weekly.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the maintenance window.
- `schedule` (Attributes) Schedule definition for the maintenance window. (see below for nested schema)

### Optional

- `alert_ids` (List of String) IDs of specific alerts to suppress during the window. If empty, the window applies to all alerts.
- `description` (String) Free-form description.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Autogenerated unique ID.
- `kind` (String) Server-assigned kind tag.

### Nested Schema for `schedule`

Required:

- `timezone` (String) IANA timezone string (e.g., `UTC`, `Europe/Berlin`).

Optional:

- `end_time` (String) RFC3339 end timestamp for a one-shot (non-recurring) window.
- `recurrence` (Attributes) Recurrence rule. Set this for repeating windows. (see below for nested schema)
- `start_time` (String) RFC3339 start timestamp.

### Nested Schema for `schedule.recurrence`

Required:

- `duration` (String) Window duration as a Go duration string (e.g., `2h`, `30m`).
- `repeat_type` (String) Recurrence cadence. One of: `daily`, `weekly`, `monthly`.
- `start_time` (String) RFC3339 timestamp of the first occurrence.

Optional:

- `end_time` (String) RFC3339 timestamp at which the recurrence stops repeating.
- `repeat_on` (List of String) For `weekly`: weekdays (`monday`, `tuesday`, ...). For `monthly`: day-of-month numbers as strings.
